Hyos..Bladder: Paralysis of the bladder after labor, so that the urine remains in the bladder, with no desire to urinate.
Hyos..Chest: Spasms of the muscles of the chest.
Hyos..Extremities: Paralytic weakness of the limbs. Convulsions of the muscles. Twitching. Frequent twitchings of the muscles of the hands and feet.
Hyos..Generalities: All the muscles tremble and quiver, a constant state of erethism throughout the economy. A state of irritability and excitability.
Hyos..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Gradually increasing weakness, whether it be in a continued fever where there has been a delirium or excitement, or in a case of insanity with erethism, of the nerves and mind; excitability and gradually increasing weakness.
Hyos..Head: In the Hyoscyamus fevers there is so much brain trouble, and there is left behind a tendency to muscular weakness of the eyes, disturbances of the eyes, and congestion of the retina, and disturbances of vision.
Hyos..Mind: The mental state is really the greatest part of Hyoscyamus. Talking, passive delirium, imaginations, illusions, hallucinations; talking, rousing up and talking with a delirious manifestation, and then stupor.
Hyos..Mind, irritability: A state of irritability and excitability.
Hyos..Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: It goes as a passive medicine, while the upper ones are more active. Hyoscyamus has a passive mania. Does not go into violence.
Hyos..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: All the muscles tremble and quiver, a constant state of erethism throughout the economy. A state of irritability and excitability.
Hyos..Mind, restlessness, night: Starts up in a fright. jerks in sleep, and cries out.
Hyos..Mouth: The mouth is very dry, as dry as burnt leather.
Hyos..Mouth, dryness: Very great dryness of the mouth, throat and nose, wherever the mucous membranes are.
Hyos..Sleep: The sleep is a great tribulation to this nervous patient. There are times of sleeplessness. Again, profound sleep.
Hyos..Stomach: The stomach is distended. Great pain in the stomach. Dryness evidently in the stomach like there is in the mouth, because it occurs along with it. Burning and smarting in the stomach; and when there is no inflammation there is vomiting of blood.
Hyos..Bladder, urination: No desire of the bladder to expel the contents.
Hyos..Clinical, paralysis: Hyoscyamus has various crampings; cramps in the fingers and toes and of the muscles here and there, temporary paralysis, etc.
Hyos..Generalities, weakness: Complete prostration, so that the patient slides down in bed, until the jaw drops.
Hyos..Head, congestion: Children, either in convulsions, or between convulsions, in congestion, also grind the teeth in the night, and in this comatose state.
